name: Seasoned Bread Crumbs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped parsley or 2 tbsp Dry parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bread crumbs, onion, parsley, garlic, oregano, and cheese in a large bowl.
2. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a tightly covered container and store it in the freezer for up to 6 months.
4. For serving, use approximately 3 tablespoons (49 calories) per portion.
- Nutritional information: 1/2 Starchy Choice, 8 g carbohydrates, 2 g protein, 1 g fat
